content:
Saturn in Leo: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Saturn in Leo blends the archetypal drive of Saturn (where you face discipline, responsibility, and long-term mastery) with the Fire, fixed nature of Leo.

  • Planet: Saturn — structure, discipline, responsibility, limitation, mastery
  • Sign: Leo (Fire/Fixed) — expression, pride, generosity, creativity, warmth

Eastern Perspective
